# init(_:)

**Initializer**

Creates a time code description flavor.

## Declaration

```swift
init(_ rawValue: CFString)
```

## Parameters

- **rawValue**: A string value.

## Creating a Timecode Description Flavor

- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates a time code description flavor.
